start.text: Yeah, of course {NAME} wants me to tell a joke.
"Haha, look at the stupid {COLOR}{TYPE} telling jokes!" Fuck you. It isn't funny.
But I'll do it anyway. Because you want me to. I hope you're happy.
HEY YOU IDIOTS ITS TIME FOR A JOKE
Senpai {NAME} wants me to tell a joke.
Hey all prepare for a joke.
I'm not here to entertain you.
Prepare for something Seamus AND fune never heard of, {NAME}
THE FOLLOWING JOKE MAY OFFEND PEOPLE. IF YOU ARE OFFENDED, PLEASE GO TO NOTHING
Ready for some classic Unfunny comedy?
Time for whatever horrible fucking jokes the creator of this site wrote.

middle.text: What is easy to get into, but hard to get out of?
Child support!
What did the digital clock say to the grandfather clock?
I AM TIRED OF YOU SAYING "AAAAAAAAAAAAADWYDHJDGWHJDGWSHJGS" YOU DUMBASS.
What goes in pink and comes out blue?
Sonic's A- WOAH WOAH WOAH WHAT?.
What type of water won't freeze?
I do not fucking know.
What is in the middle of Paris?
A giant nonophono.
Why did the chicken cross the road?
Ok, let's get serious. I'll let you in on a little secret the feds don't want you knowing.
Phones have a secret "Instant Charging" feature, you can enable it by microwaving your phone.
Just use a charger instead. do not overheat your phone
What do you call a man who shaves 10 times a day?
A centepede.
Why can't diogo drive?
Because he turned into doggis!
Black lives matter is not a joke.
WHITE LIVES ALSO MATTER!
Why was six afraid of seven?
Because seven was a- nvm
nvm i will not tell a joke
Why can bfdi users graduate?
Because they do not have to repeat kindergarten!
Who did the ananymass blame for his mistakes?
being dumb
How many kiddies does it take to knock down a lightbulb?
I don't know but just a few can knock down themselfs.
What do you call an PEDOHPHILE WHO SUPPORTS LOLICON
ShameASS/Siobitch.
This site has more jokes.
I edited them btw
I Flood Monkey Chat sites Cuz i hate them. Who am I?
Melika
What is a cow that eats grass?
I do not know, it COULD be you.
I'm a comedic genius, I know.
Why do they call HTML HyperText?
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Sorry. I just had an epiphany of my own sad, sad existence.

end.text: You know {NAME}, a good friend laughs at your jokes even when they're not so funny.
Do I amuse you, {NAME}? Am I funny? Do I make you laugh?
Don't judge me on my sense of humor alone.
Where do I come up with these? a site?
You should tell these jokes to your mother!
Maybe I'll keep my day job, {NAME}. Patreon didn't accept me.
